personal_info.name: 刘剑
personal_info.title: 副教授
personal_info.general_description: 近年来，共发表或接收SCI/EI期刊论文70余篇，其中第一/通信作者SCI论文30余篇。申请与受理国家发明专利20余项。荣获2023年中国自动化学会自然科学一等奖，2021年中国自动化学会优秀博士学位论文奖，2021年吴文俊人工智能优秀博士学位论文奖，2020年北京市优秀毕业生等荣誉。主持多项国家级、省部级和其他各类基金项目，包括国家自然科学基金（青年基金、面上项目），江苏省基础研究计划青年基金，中国博士后创新人才支持计划，中国博士后科学基金面上资助等。担任IEEE/CAA Journal of Automatica Sinica青年编委、工程科学学报青年编委、智能科学与技术学报专题编委。

research_interests: 自主无人系统智能控制
多机器人系统协作控制
多智能体系统博弈优化
全驱动水下机器人建模与控制

courses_taught.name: 非线性系统分析与控制

other_statements.recruitment_message: 欢迎自动化、计算机、机械、数学及相关专业学生报考！
other_statements.research_philosophy: 科研四心：好奇心、是非（严谨）心、自信心、进取心！
other_statements.student_cultivation_philosophy: 学生培养：追求质量、把控数量、见贤思齐、人人茁壮！
other_statements.common_goal: 共同目标：克己勤勉、求真务实、不论出处、止于至善！

academic_appointments: IEEE/CAA Journal of Automatica Sinica（自动化学报英文版）青年编委

research_projects.name: 国家自然科学基金面上项目, 非完整信息下的多自主体系统固定时间安全协同控制研究
江苏省基础研究计划（自然科学基金）青年基金, 固定时间多自主体系统事件触发协同控制与博弈优化
国家自然科学基金青年基金
2020年度博士后创新人才支持计划
中国博士后科学基金面上资助一等

list_of_publications: J. Liu, Y. Zhang, Y. Yu, C. Sun. Fixed-time event-triggered consensus for nonlinear multiagent systems without continuous communications. IEEE Transactions on Systems, Man, and Cybernetics: Systems, 2019.
J. Liu, Y. Zhang, Y. Yu, C. Sun. Fixed-time leader-follower consensus of networked nonlinear systems via event/self-triggered control. IEEE Transactions on Neural Networks and Learning Systems, 2020.
J. Liu, Y. Yu, H. He, C. Sun. Team-triggered practical fixed-time consensus of double-integrator agents with uncertain disturbance. IEEE Transactions on Cybernetics, 2021.

J. Liu, Y. Yu, Y. Xu, Y. Zhang, C. Sun. Fixed-time averageconsensus of nonlinear delayed MASs under switching topologies: Anevent-based triggering approach. IEEE Transactions on Systems, Man, and Cybernetics: Systems, 2022.

J. Liu, G. Ran, Y. Huang, C. Han, Y. Yu, C. Sun. Adaptive event-triggeredfinite-time dissipative filtering for interval type-2 fuzzy Markovjump systems with asynchronous modes. IEEE Transactions on Cybernetics, 2022.
J. Liu, G. Ran, Y. Wu, L. Xue, C. Sun. Dynamic event-triggeredpractical fixed-time consensus for nonlinear multi-agent systems. IEEE Transactions on Circuits and Systems II: Express Briefs, 2022.
J. Liu, Y. Wu, M. Sun, C. Sun. Fixed-time cooperative tracking for delayed disturbed multi-agent systems under dynamic event-triggered control. IEEE/CAA Journal of Automatica Sinica, 2022.

J. Liu, Y. Zhang, Y. Yu, H. Liu, C. Sun. A Zeno-free self-triggered approach to practical fixed-time consensus tracking with input delay. IEEE Transactions on Systems, Man, and Cybernetics: Systems, 2022.

J. Liu, J. Shi, Y. Wu, X. Wang, J. Sun, C. Sun. Event-based predefined-time second-order practical consensus with application to connected automated vehicles. IEEE Transactions on Intelligent Vehicles, 2023.

J. Liu, Y. Yang, Y. Wu, S. Al-Dabooni, L. Xue, D. C. Wunsch. Exponential synchronization of reaction-diffusion systems on networks via asynchronous intermittent control. IEEE Transactions on Signal and Information Processing over Networks, 2023.
J. Liu, J. Shi, X. Yuan, Y. Wu, C. Sun. Dynamic event-based nonsingular practical fixed-time second-order consensus. IEEE Transactions on Network Science and Engineering, 2024.
J. Liu, J. Liu, Y. Wu, C. Mu, C. Sun. Aperiodically intermittent event-based fixed-time consensus tracking and its applications. IEEE Transactions on Automation Science and Engineering, 2024.

J. Liu, Z. Lian, J. Shi, L. Dong, C. Sun. Intermittent fixed-time fuzzy consensus of nonlinear multiagent systems with unknown control directions and event-based communication. IEEE Transactions on Fuzzy Systems, 2024.
J. Liu, J. Shi, Y. Wu, X. Wang, C. Sun. Self-triggered predefined-time consensus tracking control of nonlinear multiple ground vehicles. IEEE Transactions on Vehicular Technology, 2024.

J. Liu, J. Liu, Y. Wu, C. Mu, C. Sun. Aperiodically intermittent fixed-time synchronization of coupled reaction-diffusion systems via average control rate. IEEE Transactions on Systems, Man, and Cybernetics: Systems, 2024.

Y. Wu, Y. Wang, J. Liu*, Y. Xu. Exponential synchronization of complex networks: An intermittent adaptive event-triggered control strategy. IEEE Transactions on Circuits and Systems I: Regular Papers, 2021.
J. Liu, Y. Wu, L.Xue, J. Liu*. A new intermittent control approach to practical fixed-time consensus with input delay. IEEE Transactions on Circuits and Systems II: Express Briefs, 2023.
孙佳, 贾玉斌, 武永宝, 董璐, 刘剑*. 随机干扰下拓扑时变 Kuramoto网络事件触发固定时间同步. 控制理论与应用, 2024.
石井龙, 刘志杰, 郭皓晨, 刘剑*. 动态事件触发下的一阶非线性多智能体系统设定时间一致. 工程科学学报, 2024.
